title: Smells
questions: What comes to mind when you hear the word 'smell'?
Do you ever worry that you smell or that your breath smells?
Do you have a keen sense of smell?
Can smells change our mood and make us healthier?
What smells remind you of your childhood?
What odors that you smell on a daily basis would you rather not smell?
Do you prefer the smell of freshly brewed coffee or freshly baked bread?
What's the loveliest smell in nature?
What's the smelliest smell in the world?
Why do children love smelly things?
What's your favourite smell?
What are the smells of your home?
What are the smells of your town?
Do you like the smell of fresh air?
What does your school smell like?
Do images go with smells? If I tell you to think about the smell of a dentist's clinic, what images come to mind?
Do you think we'll be able to download smells from the Internet one day?
What can you smell right now?
If you could choose five smells around you all the time, what would you choose?
What would life be like without the sense of smell?
